use_cases: Hero section decorative animated border effect with flowing gradient
Landing page visual enhancement with color-shifting border animation
Card or container border glow effect for premium feel
Marketing page accent element to draw attention
Interactive UI border decoration with customizable colors and timing
ai_summary: A decorative BorderBeam component that creates an animated flowing gradient border effect using CSS animations. The component renders a pseudo-element that animates around the edges of its parent container, using configurable colors, size, duration, and delay. Perfect for adding visual polish to hero sections, cards, or call-to-action areas with a modern, dynamic appearance.
